blocks.headline: Extraordinary _vocal music_. Performed, commissioned, & preserved.
blocks.body: Staff & Ledger is a new professional vocal ensemble and publishing house dedicated to the music of our time.
blocks.foundedBy: *Founded by* artists from Chanticleer, Volti, Clerestory, Acternum, Byrd Ensemble, Fog City Singers, American Bach Soloists, and the San Francisco Symphony Chorus.
blocks.imageAlt: A dark rehearsal room with warm light on music stands and score folios.

items.title: Perform
items.body: Intimate concerts. New music. World premieres.

items.title: Publish
items.body: Beautiful editions. Thoughtful scores. Built to last.

blocks.text: We believe the choral composer's instrument is people.
blocks.accent: We exist to help great music travel.
